title: Moving Triangle Passing Pattern
summary: A diamond passing pattern that works 3-man triangle passes, ideally with one-touch passing.  Excellent for body shape and pass weighting reps
setupHtml: Diamond (at least 10 yds apart) with a cone in the center.  Player on each cone, 6th player behind player starting with the one ball.
instructionsHtml:
1. Outside player A passes to B
2. B sets back to A
3. A passes inside to center (C) and moves to next cone (B)
4. C plays a through ball to B who begins run (and restarts as A in these instructions)
5. Once four triangles have been made (all the way around diamond), center player rotates out after playing through ball
emphasisHtml: Continuous passing and movement; Clean passes that are: snappy/weighted well, suggest receiver next touch
